title: Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
